name: L-6 aggregator counts distinct orgs not raw PR count for the organizations_count threshold per architecture
command: printf '%s' '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"org":"cfpb","tier":1},{"org":"stripe","tier":1},{"org":"stripe","tier":1},{"org":"stripe","tier":1}]}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern p.json --emit-fields 2>err.txt && grep -q '"organizations_count":2' err.txt && grep -q '"evidence_count":4' err.txt && echo distinct 1>&2
